inputs.label: Operating Pressure
inputs.businessContext: System working pressure affects stress on components.

businessContext_i18n.en: System working pressure affects stress on components.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sistem çalışma basıncı bileşenler üzerindeki stresi etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Systemarbeitsdruck beeinflusst die Belastung der Komponenten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La pression de travail du système affecte les contraintes sur les composants.
businessContext_i18n.es: La presión de trabajo del sistema afecta el esfuerzo sobre los componentes.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ضغط عمل النظام يؤثر على الإجهاد على المكونات.

inputs.label: Operating Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Elevated temperatures reduce material strength and increase corrosion rates.

businessContext_i18n.en: Elevated temperatures reduce material strength and increase corrosion rates.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yüksek sıcaklıklar malzeme mukavemetini azaltır ve korozyon oranlarını artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erhöhte Temperaturen verringern die Materialfestigkeit und erhöhen die Korrosionsraten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Les températures élevées réduisent la résistance des matériaux et augmentent les taux de corrosion.
businessContext_i18n.es: Las temperaturas elevadas reducen la resistencia del material y aumentan las tasas de corrosión.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجات الحرارة المرتفعة تقلل من قوة المواد وتزيد من معدلات التآكل.

inputs.label: Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fluid velocity contributes to erosion and vibration risks.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fluid velocity contributes to erosion and vibration risks.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akışkan hızı, erozyon ve titreşim risklerine katkıda bulunur.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Strömungsgeschwindigkeit trägt zu Erosions- und Vibrationsrisiken bei.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La vitesse du fluide contribue aux risques d'érosion et de vibrations.
businessContext_i18n.es: La velocidad del fluido contribuye a riesgos de erosión y vibración.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سرعة المائع تساهم في مخاطر التآكل والاهتزاز.

inputs.label: Vibration Level
inputs.businessContext: Vibration can cause fatigue and joint loosening.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vibration can cause fatigue and joint loosening.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Titreşim, yorulma ve bağlantı gevşemesine neden olabilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vibrationen können Ermüdung und Lockerung von Verbindungen verursachen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Les vibrations peuvent provoquer de la fatigue et un desserrage des joints.
businessContext_i18n.es: La vibración puede causar fatiga y aflojamiento de uniones.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الاهتزاز يمكن أن يسبب الكلال وارتخاء الوصلات.

inputs.label: Wall Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thinner walls are more susceptible to failure under pressure and corrosion.

businessContext_i18n.en: Thinner walls are more susceptible to failure under pressure and corrosion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Daha ince duvarlar, basınç ve korozyon altında arızaya daha yatkındır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dünnere Wände sind anfälliger für Versagen unter Druck und Korrosion.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Les parois plus fines sont plus susceptibles de céder sous la pression et la corrosion.
businessContext_i18n.es: Paredes más delgadas son más susceptibles a fallas bajo presión y corrosión.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الجدران الرقيقة أكثر عرضة للفشل تحت الضغط والتآكل.

inputs.label: Corrosion Rate
inputs.businessContext: Material loss over time reduces structural integrity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Material loss over time reduces structural integrity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zamanla malzeme kaybı yapısal bütünlüğü azaltır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Materialverlust im Laufe der Zeit verringert die strukturelle Integrität.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La perte de matériau au fil du temps réduit l'intégrité structurelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: La pérdida de material con el tiempo reduce la integridad estructural.
businessContext_i18n.ar: فقدان المواد بمرور الوقت يقلل من السلامة الهيكلية.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
